title: bus.hearth.session.started v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api's session_events module when a new tmux pane appears in the hearth-session cache for the first time. Fires once per session lifecycle; subsequent poll cycles with the same session_id do NOT re-emit. Used by the phone app to populate the session list.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier (ULID or UUID) from hearth-session.

project.description: Absolute path of the project this session is running in.

project_short.description: Short project name derived from the project path (e.g. 'home-automation').

tmux_pane.description: tmux pane ID that hosts this session (e.g. '%42').

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the session was first observed.
